Mentions Timeline (3 articles)
3303-01-12
Freelance Report Fuel Rats Complete 20,000th Rescue
The Fuel Rats complete their 20,000th rescue since June 3301. Commander Termite Altair is honored for 750 successful rescues, and the milestone rescue took place in the Alrai Sector.
3302-08-05
Freelance Report Fuel Rats Announce Plans for New Outpost
The Fuel Rats Mischief announced plans for an extraction outpost near Jaques Station to support deep-space rescue operations. The location was chosen because Jaques Station provides a steady supply of commodities and habitation infrastructure.
3301-11-29
Rescue Ships to be Given Bold New Livery
The Pilots Federation and Fuel Rats unveil a distinctive new colour scheme for search-and-rescue vessels, designed by Commander Father Cool of the Fuel Rats Mischief to enable instant recognition and minimise accidental attacks on rescue ships.
